argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const wait = (ms) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); await wait(1000); const initialState = window.__INITIAL_STATE__; const items = []; const seen = new Set(); const addItems = (feedItems) => { if (!Array.isArray(feedItems)) return; for (const item of feedItems) { const noteId = item?.id || item?.noteId; if (!noteId || seen.has(noteId)) continue; seen.add(noteId); const noteCard = item?.note_card || item; items.push({ id: noteId, title: noteCard?.display_title || '', type: noteCard?.type || '', author: noteCard?.user?.nickname || '', likes: noteCard?.interact_info?.liked_count || 0, url: 'https://www.xiaohongshu.com/explore/' + noteId }); if (items.length >= limit) break; } }; if (initialState?.homefeed?.data?.items) addItems(initialState.homefeed.data.items); if (initialState?.feed?.homefeed?.data?.items) addItems(initialState.feed.homefeed.data.items); if (items.length === 0) { const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section.note-item, .feeds-page section'); sections.forEach(section => { const link = section.querySelector('a[href*="/explore/"]'); const href = link?.getAttribute('href') || ''; const match = href.match(/\/explore\/([a-f0-9]+)/); const noteId = match?.[1] || ''; if (!noteId || seen.has(noteId)) return; seen.add(noteId); const titleEl = section.querySelector('.title, .note-title, a.title, .footer .title span'); const nameEl = section.querySelector('a.author .name, .name, .author-name'); const likesEl = section.querySelector('.count, .like-count, .like-wrapper .count'); items.push({ id: noteId, title: (titleEl?.textContent || '').trim(), type: '', author: (nameEl?.textContent || '').trim(), likes: (likesEl?.textContent || '').trim(), url: 'https://www.xiaohongshu.com/explore/' + noteId }); }); } return { items, limit }; }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; const items = intermediate.items || []; if (!items.length) return [{ rank: 0, title: 'No feed items found', author: '', likes: 0, type: '', url: '' }]; return items.slice(0, limit).map((item, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, ...item })); }
